summary:
I need permission to access `/tmp/phantom-engine`. Please approve access so I can analyze the project structure and run the code health checks.

Once approved, I'll:
1. Detect the project type (Node, Python, Go, Rust, etc.)
2. Run type checker
3. Run tests
4. Run security audit  
5. Scan for TODO/FIXME/HACK comments
6. Generate a comprehensive health report
